description: Precise infernal skirmisher who accelerates through clean close-range takedowns.

presentation.headline: Fast blood-blade skirmisher who rewards clean takedown chains.
presentation.fantasy_hook: A needle blade, fang dagger, and trailing crimson sash turn every movement into a deliberate challenge.
presentation.identity_summary: The Blood Duelist blends ritual precision with the Devil arsenal's aggressive close-range tools. Each takedown sharpens the next exchange, creating brief windows of fast, escalating offense.
presentation.passive_summary: Enemy kills briefly grant attack speed and damage, stacking up to three times during an uninterrupted duel.
tradeoffs: Less forgiving when the kill chain breaks
